response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership via open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack including mobile (iOS/Apple TV), build systems, and infrastructure
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Lacks demonstrated experience in mobile platform ecosystem optimization (iOS/Android)
No mention of roadmap planning, organizational change, or cross-team alignment at scale
